intro.greeting: Hello! I'm Juliana Villegas, a Design Engineer with 6+ years of experience bridging the gap between design and development.
intro.scrollPrompt: Do you want to know more about me?

about.title: ABOUT ME
description: I specialize in building seamless, user-centric digital experiences from concept to production. With expertise in modern frontend frameworks and a strong design foundation, I transform complex requirements into intuitive, accessible interfaces.

I thrive at the intersection of design and code, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver products that delight users. I'm passionate about design systems, component libraries, and creating scalable solutions that bridge creative vision with technical excellence.

contact.title: CONTACT ME
description: I'm always excited to collaborate on projects that push the boundaries of design and technology. Whether you need a design engineer to bring your vision to life or want to discuss the latest in frontend development, let's connect!
This portfolio was crafted with React and TypeScript, showcasing the same attention to detail I bring to every project.
